stimulus: Mae Jemison, a physician and astronaut, ______blank a member of the crew that conducted scientific experiments aboard the space shuttle Endeavour in 1992.
stem: Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
rationale:
Choice D is correct. The singular verb “was” agrees in number with the singular subject “Mae Jemison.”

Choices A, B, and C are all plural verb forms that don’t agree with the singular subject.
